message:
feat(engine): add 107 enrichment integration tests across 3 more modules

Nineteenth batch (3 new, 2 pre-existing skipped):

- signature_drift_gate: 45 tests (drift measurement, budget tracking,
  multi-reason gate escalation, ledger lifecycle, batch evaluation)
- sorted_multisig: 26 tests (large signer sets, quorum boundaries,
  incremental insert ordering, input permutation determinism)
- specialization_index: 36 tests (receipt insertion, epoch filtering,
  invalidation lifecycle, audit chains, extension summaries)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
